name: Verifica_EdicionPrgServicios
wl_code:
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 27, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
nEstado27 is int=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 28, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
nEstado28 is int=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 29, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
nEstado29 is int=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 30, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
nEstado30 is int=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 29, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
IF nEstado30=0 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1
ELSE IF nEstado30=1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
END
nEstado29=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 26, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
IF nEstado27=1 AND nEstado28=1 AND nEstado29=1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
//ELSE IF nEstado27=0 AND nEstado28=0 AND nEstado29=0 THEN
//
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
ELSE IF nEstado27=1 OR nEstado28=1 OR nEstado29=1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1
ELSE IF nEstado27=-1 OR nEstado28=-1 OR nEstado29=-1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1
END
Local procedure Verifica_EdicionSolBien
